title: Bnk system
description: BankMode adds banking, interest, and loans to your Minecraft server with Vault or internal economy support.
body:
🏦 BankMode – Your Minecraft Server’s Personal Banker
Welcome to BankMode, a feature-rich banking plugin designed for Minecraft servers that want more than just basic economy tools. With full deposit/withdrawal mechanics, configurable interest and loan systems, and seamless integration with Vault or an internal economy, BankMode makes your players' financial lives more dynamic, strategic, and fun.

🌟 Overview
BankMode transforms your server’s economy with advanced banking features:

💵 Deposits & Withdrawals — Secure and intuitive for players

🧮 Interest System — Configurable rates, real-time countdowns, and auto-payouts

💳 Loan System — Auto-approved loans, interest tracking, and aggressive collection

🔗 Dual Economy — Use Vault or BankMode’s own internal economy

🕒 Live Updates — Countdown timers and visual status tracking

⚠️ Smart Collections — Automatically handles overdue loans and negative balances

Whether you’re building an MMO server or a roleplay city, BankMode brings professionalism to your players’ finances.

💰 Banking Commands


```
/bnk deposit 1000         # Deposit $1000
/bnk withdraw 500         # Withdraw $500
/bnk balance              # Check your balance
/bnk history              # View transaction history
/bnk status live          # Show live interest countdown
```


💳 Loan Commands


```
/bnk loan request 3000 "Tools"   # Request a $3000 loan
/bnk loan pay abc123 1000        # Pay $1000 toward loan ID abc123
/bnk loan list                   # List your active loans
```


⚙️ Admin Commands


```
/bnk config interest 5.0         # Set interest rate to 5%
/bnk config economy internal     # Switch to internal economy
/bnk internal set Steve 10000    # Set Steve's balance to $10,000
Run /bnk help in-game to explore more.
```
